name: agent
title: Flutch Agent
description: Multi-variant agent engine with simple chat and consultative sales graphs
detailedDescription: Flutch OSS agent engine supporting multiple graph variants. Simple variant provides basic Q&A with tool support. Sales variant adds lead context loading and post-conversation data persistence for consultative sales workflows.
author: Flutch Team

ui.description: Configure agent graph variant and settings
